mapper.sql: a.id, a.company_id AS "company.id", a.office_id AS "office.id", a.login_name AS "loginName", a.password, a.des_password AS "desPassword", a.no, a.name, a.email, a.phone, a.mobile, a.user_type AS "userType", a.login_ip AS "loginIp", a.login_date AS "loginDate", a.remarks, a.login_flag AS "loginFlag", a.photo, a.qrcode, a.sign, a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date, a.update_by AS "updateBy.id", a.update_date, a.del_flag, a.sso_login_flag AS "ssoLoginFlag", a.useable, a.sort AS "sortIndex", a.sso_des_password AS "ssoDesPassword", a.is_sys AS "isSys", a.user_type AS "secLevel", a.login_exception_count AS "loginExceptionCount", a.password_expired_date AS "passwordExpiredDate", a.iim_status AS "status", c.name AS "company.name", c.short_name AS "company.shortName", c.code AS "company.code", c.name_en AS "company.nameEn", c.primary_person AS "company.primaryPerson.id", c.deputy_person AS "company.deputyPerson.id", c.area_id AS "company.area.code", c.area_id AS "company.area.id", o.name AS "office.name", o.short_name AS "office.shortName", o.code AS "office.code", o.primary_person AS "office.primaryPerson.id", o.deputy_person AS "office.deputyPerson.id", o.area_id AS "office.area.code", o.area_id AS "office.area.id" /*,extuser.enterprise_id AS "extEntId"*/
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_user a
WHERE 1=2
or o.parent_ids like '%,${officeId},%'
or a.office_id in
#{officeId}

SELECT
FROM sys_user a
WHERE a.level_id IN
#{levelId}

SELECT
FROM sys_user a
WHERE a.post_id IN
#{postId}

SELECT
FROM sys_user a
LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON a.id = ur.user_id WHERE ur.role_id IN
#{roleId}

SELECT
FROM sys_user a
WHERE a.id IN
#{userId}

SELECT
FROM sys_user a
WHERE a.login_name IN
#{assginee}

SELECT
FROM sys_user a
LEFT JOIN sys_org_user sou ON a.id = sou.user_id WHERE sou.org_id in
#{orgId}
SELECT a.id AS "id", a.office_id AS "parentId", a.name AS "name" FROM sys_user a WHERE a.useable = #{useable} AND a.office_id = #{office.id}

SELECT a.id AS "id", a.office_id AS "parentId", a.name AS "name", a.login_name AS "loginName" FROM sys_user a WHERE a.useable = #{useable}
AND( a.is_sys != '1' OR a.is_sys is null )
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.login_name, a.is_sys FROM sys_user a LEFT JOIN sys_user_role b ON a.id = b.user_id WHERE a.del_flag = '0' ${condition} ORDER BY a.name

SELECT a.id, a.company_id AS "company.id", company.name AS "company.name", company.short_name AS "company.shortName", company.name_en AS "company.nameEn", company.area_id AS "company.area.id", company.code AS "company.code", a.office_id AS "office.id", office.name AS "office.name", office.short_name AS "office.shortName", office.name_en AS "company.nameEn", office.area_id AS "office.area.id", office.code AS "office.code", a.login_name AS "loginName", a.no, a.name, a.email, a.phone, a.mobile, a.user_type AS "userType", a.login_ip AS "loginIp", a.login_date AS "loginDate", a.remarks, a.login_flag AS "loginFlag", a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date, a.update_by AS "updateBy.id", a.update_date, a.del_flag, a.sso_login_flag AS "ssoLoginFlag", a.useable, a.sort AS "sortIndex", a.sign, a.is_sys AS "isSys", a.sec_level AS "secLevel", a.login_exception_count AS "loginExceptionCount", a.password_expired_date AS "passwordExpiredDate", a.iim_status AS "status" FROM sys_user a LEFT JOIN sys_office office on office.id = a.office_id and office.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_office company on company.id = a.company_id and company.del_flag = '0' WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.id = #{userId}

SELECT a.id, a.company_id AS "company.id", company.name AS "company.name", company.short_name AS "company.shortName", company.name_en AS "company.nameEn", company.area_id AS "company.area.id", company.code AS "company.code", a.office_id AS "office.id", office.name AS "office.name", office.short_name AS "office.shortName", office.name_en AS "company.nameEn", office.area_id AS "office.area.id", office.code AS "office.code", a.login_name AS "loginName", a.no, a.name, a.email, a.phone, a.mobile, a.user_type AS "userType", a.login_ip AS "loginIp", a.login_date AS "loginDate", a.remarks, a.login_flag AS "loginFlag", a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date, a.update_by AS "updateBy.id", a.update_date, a.del_flag, a.sso_login_flag AS "ssoLoginFlag", a.useable, a.sort AS "sortIndex", a.sign, a.is_sys AS "isSys", a.sec_level AS "secLevel", a.login_exception_count AS "loginExceptionCount", a.password_expired_date AS "passwordExpiredDate", a.iim_status AS "status" FROM sys_user a INNER JOIN sys_office office on office.id = a.office_id and office.del_flag = '0' INNER JOIN sys_office company on company.id = a.company_id and company.del_flag = '0' WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND office.primary_person = #{primaryPersonId}
mapper.update: update sys_user set login_flag = '1', login_exception_count = 0 WHERE login_name = #{loginName}
mapper.select: SELECT `CODE` FROM sys_office so LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON so.id = su.OFFICE_ID WHERE su.LOGIN_NAME = #{loginName}

SELECT
FROM sys_user a
WHERE a.parent_id in
#{orgId}

SELECT
FROM sys_user a
WHERE a.no = #{no} AND a.del_flag = '0'
